TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nakamuwan ni Cay-Ing-Wen cung-tung tu paniyul a sakakapah i 2016 a amihcan u cung-tung nu taywan ci Cay-ing-wen, napatadikud tu kamu paniyul a pakakapah tu nadikudan, i binacadan nu itaywanay, sakamu sa ci Cay-ing-wen, yu mahida henay mahkatayni ku namakayniyay i hulam a tademaw, anu layak aca atu hitay nu Hulam aca, tayni ku heni i taywan sa misawacu i tamuwan u Binacadan a yincumin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u Binacadan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, caay kau la'tusay u kapahay tuway kina kawaw tuyniyan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuuday. anu tatenga' patadikud tu sasakamuen, panacacay han ku kawaw kya u tatenga'ay patadikud, saan ku nipangiha' nu katuuday, adiha hansa inayi' ku cacacacay aca nu wayway, tadaw u nipahemul a cacay tu kamu i Binacadan, saan amin ku mitapalay . anu tatenga' mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapalay i tini i taywan; anu i cuwacuwaay a Binacadan, malecalecad ku nipiadih mutapal tina kawawan, i nayi' ku heci nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idayhan u paduh acacay inayi' ku nilacul tu heci saan, u muhalhalay tu amin ku katuuday a Binacadan, tu nipilacul ni Cay-ing-wen tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nilacul a heci, katukuh ayda inayi' ku tekiteki nu nipakilukilul aca, sepat henay a mihcan mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a malaCung-tung, caay haw? an idaw ku balucu' nida, amipatadikud tu nikapatelacan i tawya i kasumamadan, kau namakay labuway nu balacu' a kamu ku sapatahekal, patengil tu katuuday a binacadan, kya amasinanut ku nipitengil nu katuuday mitapal. wycanan ku pingalalan nu binacadan ayda uycanan ku hahalhalen nu Binacadan tu tatenga'ay a nipatadikud tu sasakamuen, uycanan ku ngalalen nu katuuday tu nipaini tu sasakamuen, wahacacay han nu Kanatal a mupabelih i binawlan, u sasalabuen, u sahenulay a kawaw tu sakay tini i sabawenemay a Binacadan. sakacacay, wahican nu Kanatal pasukas kuni alawan, i Binacadan tu lala'i kasumamadan, u naumahan nu Binawlan i tawya, anyaan pasukas ku kanatal a saheciyn musakamu kya, amasulinga' ku nipitengil nu binawlan. sakatusa, wacaay haw pasukas ku kanatal, tu naumahan nu babalaki i kasumamadan tulala', unaluma'an u nikabulawan malimad,uni kaykaydaan mi lami' miadup atu babutingan, aydaan u papasukasen amin nu kanatal kumahiniyay a lala'. sakatulu, u kamu nu Binacadan i , nikatayniyan nu kahulaman i taywan, lawpes saca kukamu nu Binacadan i nyadu', katukuh ayda amakaala tu waluway abataan ku mihecan, maliyuh tuamin ku wadiwawa nu binacadan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu binacadan, amalawlawpes tu kukamu inyadu', u lalangawen u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunyadu', umahiniyay a kawaw caay kawnikakayi nu binawlan caay kaw nipiales nu binawlan , uni padetengan nu kanatal apa satedep mu sakamu tukamu numita, u mahiniyay a kawaw ahican nu kanatal misakaliyuh ku mahiniyay a kawaw. u sakasepat, wapatibeng mi sanga' ku tkanatal tu cacudadan nu Binacadan, awnu Binacadan amin ku pasubana'ay i cacudadan, kya ama palekal ku mamalawpesay tu a kamu nu binacadan, hinien ku kakawaw kya u tatenga'ay ani pasukas tu sasakamun, palu tatenga' ku katuudaya Binacadan. u sakalima sa, anu tatenga'patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i binacadan hawsa, ku hakalamkam han paculil patapabaw pacumud i kinpu, tu nisanga'an tu hulic nu binacadan, tu sakay tini i naumahan unubayu, atu sapi siteked nu binacadan milhida maudip, itini i taywan kya u tatenga'ay ani patadikud tukawaw.
S.PHON: nakamuwan ni ¶aj-iŇč-w…ôn ¶uŇč-tuŇč tu panijur~…ĺ a sakakapańß i **** a amińß ¶an u ¶uŇč-tuŇč nu tajwan ¶i ¶aj-iŇč-w…ôn, napatadikud tu kamu panijur~…ĺ a pakakapańß tu nadikudan, i bina ¶adan nu itajwanaj, sakamu sa ¶i ¶aj-iŇč-w…ôn, ju mańßida ńß…ônaj mańßkatajni ku namakajnijaj i ńßur~…ĺam a tad…ômaw, anu r~…ĺajak a ¶a atu ńßitaj nu ńßur~…ĺam a ¶a, tajni ku ńß…ôni i tajwan sa misawa ¶u i tamuwan u bina ¶adan a jin ¶umin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u bina ¶adan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, ¶aaj kau r~…ĺa Ē~ °tusaj u kapańßaj tuwaj kina kawaw tujnijan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuudaj. anu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° patadikud tu sasakamu…ôn, pana ¶a ¶aj ńßan ku kawaw kja u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj patadikud, saan ku nipaŇčińßa Ē~ ° nu katuudaj, adińßa ńßansa inaji Ē~ ° ku ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj a ¶a nu wajwaj, tadaw u nipańß…ômur~…ĺ a ¶a ¶aj tu kamu i bina ¶adan, saan amin ku mitapar~…ĺaj . anu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapar~…ĺaj i tini i tajwan; anu i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a bina ¶adan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nipiadińß mutapar~…ĺ tina kawawan, i naji Ē~ ° ku ńß…ô ¶i nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idajńßan u paduńß a ¶a ¶aj inaji Ē~ ° ku nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu ńß…ô ¶i saan, u muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺaj tu amin ku katuudaj a bina ¶adan, tu nipir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ ni ¶aj-iŇč-w…ôn tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ a ńß…ô ¶i, katukuńß ajda inaji Ē~ ° ku t…ôkit…ôki nu nipakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ a ¶a, s…ôpat ńß…ônaj a mińß ¶an mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč, ¶aaj ńßaw? an idaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida, amipatadikud tu nikapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an i tawja i kasumamadan, kau namakaj r~…ĺabuwaj nu bar~…ĺa ¶u Ē~ ° a kamu ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, pat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu katuudaj a bina ¶adan, kja amasinanut ku nipit…ôŇčir~…ĺ nu katuudaj mitapar~…ĺ. wj ¶anan ku piŇčar~…ĺar~…ĺan nu bina ¶adan ajda uj ¶anan ku ńßańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ…ôn nu bina ¶adan tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a nipatadikud tu sasakamu…ôn, uj ¶anan ku Ňčar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôn nu katuudaj tu nipaini tu sasakamu…ôn, wańßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan nu kanatar~…ĺ a mupab…ôr~…ĺińß i binawr~…ĺan, u sasar~…ĺabu…ôn, u sańß…ônur~…ĺaj a kawaw tu sakaj tini i sabaw…ôn…ômaj a bina ¶adan. saka ¶a ¶aj, wańßi ¶an nu kanatar~…ĺ pasukas kuni ar~…ĺawan, i bina ¶adan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °i kasumamadan, u naumańßan nu binawr~…ĺan i tawja, anjaan pasukas ku kanatar~…ĺ a sańß…ô ¶ijn musakamu kja, amasur~…ĺiŇča Ē~ ° ku nipit…ôŇčir~…ĺ nu binawr~…ĺan. sakatusa, wa ¶aaj ńßaw pasukas ku kanatar~…ĺ, tu naumańßan nu babar~…ĺaki i kasumamadan tur~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, unar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an u nikabur~…ĺawan mar~…ĺimad,uni kajkajdaan mi r~…ĺami Ē~ ° miadup atu babutiŇčan, ajdaan u papasukas…ôn amin nu kanatar~…ĺ kumańßinijaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. sakatur~…ĺu, u kamu nu bina ¶adan i , nikatajnijan nu kańßur~…ĺaman i tajwan, r~…ĺawp…ôs sa ¶a kukamu nu bina ¶adan i njadu Ē~ °, katukuńß ajda amakaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺuwaj abataan ku mińß…ô ¶an, mar~…ĺijuńß tuamin ku wadiwawa nu bina ¶adan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu bina ¶adan, amar~…ĺawr~…ĺawp…ôs tu kukamu injadu Ē~ °, u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw…ôn u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunjadu Ē~ °, umańßinijaj a kawaw ¶aaj kawnikakaji nu binawr~…ĺan ¶aaj kaw nipiar~…ĺ…ôs nu binawr~…ĺan , uni pad…ôt…ôŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ apa sat…ôd…ôp mu sakamu tukamu numita, u mańßinijaj a kawaw ańßi ¶an nu kanatar~…ĺ misakar~…ĺijuńß ku mańßinijaj a kawaw. u sakas…ôpat, wapatib…ôŇč mi saŇča Ē~ ° ku tkanatar~…ĺ tu ¶a ¶udadan nu bina ¶adan, awnu bina ¶adan amin ku pasubana Ē~ °aj i ¶a ¶udadan, kja ama par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku mamar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu a kamu nu bina ¶adan, ńßini…ôn ku kakawaw kja u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ani pasukas tu sasakamun, par~…ĺu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaja bina ¶adan. u sakar~…ĺima sa, anu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i bina ¶adan ńßawsa, ku ńßakar~…ĺamkam ńßan pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ patapabaw pa ¶umud i kinpu, tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ nu bina ¶adan, tu sakaj tini i naumańßan unubaju, atu sapi sit…ôk…ôd nu bina ¶adan mir~…ĺńßida maudip, itini i tajwan kja u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ani patadikud tukawaw.
S.FORM: nakamuwan ni Cay-Ing-Wen cung-tung tu paniyul a sakakapah i 2016 a amihcan u cung-tung nu taywan ci Cay-ing-wen, napatadikud tu kamu paniyul a pakakapah tu nadikudan, i binacadan nu itaywanay, sakamu sa ci Cay-ing-wen, yu mahida henay mahkatayni ku namakayniyay i hulam a tademaw, anu layak aca atu hitay nu Hulam aca, tayni ku heni i taywan sa misawacu i tamuwan u Binacadan a yincumin, saan patadikud tu sasakamun i titaan u Binacadan , u nipatadikud nida tina kamuwan sa, caay kau la'tusay u kapahay tuway kina kawaw tuyniyan, nika, sakamu saan ku katuuday. anu tatenga' patadikud tu sasakamuen, panacacay han ku kawaw kya u tatenga'ay patadikud, saan ku nipangiha' nu katuuday, adiha hansa inayi' ku cacacacay aca nu wayway, tadaw u nipahemul a cacay tu kamu i Binacadan, saan amin ku mitapalay . anu tatenga' mi patadikud tu sasakamun sakamu satu ku mitapalay i tini i taywan; anu i cuwacuwaay a Binacadan, malecalecad ku nipiadih mutapal tina kawawan, i nayi' ku heci nina nipipatadikud tu kamu saan, idayhan u paduh acacay inayi' ku nilacul tu heci saan, u muhalhalay tu amin ku katuuday a Binacadan, tu nipilacul ni Cay-ing-wen tu nakamuwan nida, tu nipatadikudan a kamu tu nilacul a heci, katukuh ayda inayi' ku tekiteki nu nipakilukilul aca, sepat henay a mihcan mamin tu misinkiw, tu sakinatusa nida a malaCung-tung, caay haw? an idaw ku balucu' nida, amipatadikud tu nikapatelacan i tawya i kasumamadan, kau namakay labuway nu balacu' a kamu ku sapatahekal, patengil tu katuuday a binacadan, kya amasinanut ku nipitengil nu katuuday mitapal. wycanan ku pingalalan nu binacadan ayda uycanan ku hahalhalen nu Binacadan tu tatenga'ay a nipatadikud tu sasakamuen, uycanan ku ngalalen nu katuuday tu nipaini tu sasakamuen, wahacacay han nu Kanatal a mupabelih i binawlan, u sasalabuen, u sahenulay a kawaw tu sakay tini i sabawenemay a Binacadan. sakacacay, wahican nu Kanatal pasukas kuni alawan, i Binacadan tu lala'i kasumamadan, u naumahan nu Binawlan i tawya, anyaan pasukas ku kanatal a saheciyn musakamu kya, amasulinga' ku nipitengil nu binawlan. sakatusa, wacaay haw pasukas ku kanatal, tu naumahan nu babalaki i kasumamadan tulala', unaluma'an u nikabulawan malimad,uni kaykaydaan mi lami' miadup atu babutingan, aydaan u papasukasen amin nu kanatal kumahiniyay a lala'. sakatulu, u kamu nu Binacadan i , nikatayniyan nu kahulaman i taywan, lawpes saca kukamu nu Binacadan i nyadu', katukuh ayda amakaala tu waluway abataan ku mihecan, maliyuh tuamin ku wadiwawa nu binacadan, musakamu tu tadakamu nu binacadan, amalawlawpes tu kukamu inyadu', u lalangawen u tuudamin unanam tu sakaudip nunyadu', umahiniyay a kawaw caay kawnikakayi nu binawlan caay kaw nipiales nu binawlan , uni padetengan nu kanatal apa satedep mu sakamu tukamu numita, u mahiniyay a kawaw ahican nu kanatal misakaliyuh ku mahiniyay a kawaw. u sakasepat, wapatibeng mi sanga' ku tkanatal tu cacudadan nu Binacadan, awnu Binacadan amin ku pasubana'ay i cacudadan, kya ama palekal ku mamalawpesay tu a kamu nu binacadan, hinien ku kakawaw kya u tatenga'ay ani pasukas tu sasakamun, palu tatenga' ku katuudaya Binacadan. u sakalima sa, anu tatenga'patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i binacadan hawsa, ku hakalamkam han paculil patapabaw pacumud i kinpu, tu nisanga'an tu hulic nu binacadan, tu sakay tini i naumahan unubayu, atu sapi siteked nu binacadan milhida maudip, itini i taywan kya u tatenga'ay ani patadikud tukawaw.

mitapar~…ĺ. wj ¶anan ku piŇčar~…ĺar~…ĺan nu bina ¶adan ajda uj ¶anan ku ńßańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ…ôn nu bina ¶adan tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a nipatadikud tu sasakamu…ôn, uj ¶anan ku Ňčar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôn nu katuudaj tu °aj ani pasukas tu sasakamun, par~…ĺu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ku katuudaja bina ¶adan. u sakar~…ĺima sa, anu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °patadikud tu nanu, kasu mamadan akawaw i bina ¶adan ńßawsa, ku ńßakar~…ĺamkam ńßan pa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj ani patadikud tukawaw.
